TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_lhlahuy, title = lhlahuy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/lhlahuy} }

S.FORM: cingay balay qsinu ru qqhuniq cyux maki lhlahuy. lhlahuy ga cyux sa zik na rgyax.
cingay balay qsinu ru qqhuniq cyux maki lhlahuy. lhlahuy ga cyux sa zik na rgyax.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qs~ɕinu ru qqħuniq ʦ~ʨjux maki lħlaħuj. lħlaħuj ɣa ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕa zik na rɣjax.
